svg.title: Phase 1: Authentication and session creation flow
svg.desc: Flowchart showing the login flow from user entering credentials to session cookie being set

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What happens when a user enters email and password?')
sendPrompt('What does the React login page do with credentials?')
sendPrompt('What does Firebase Client SDK return?')
sendPrompt('What does Firebase Admin SDK do with the idToken?')
sendPrompt('How is the session cookie created?')
sendPrompt('How is the session cookie sent to the browser?')
sendPrompt('What happens after the 200 OK response?')
